configurations.name: digitalway
runtimeArgs: const h=require('http'),f=require('fs'),p=require('path');h.createServer((q,r)=>{let u=q.url==='/'?'/index.html':q.url;let fp=p.join('C:/Users/compa/Progressing T.I/Digital Way 2.0/Digital-Way',u);let ext=p.extname(fp);let ct={'html':'text/html','css':'text/css','js':'application/javascript','jpg':'image/jpeg','png':'image/png'}[ext.slice(1)]||'text/plain';f.readFile(fp,(e,d)=>{if(e){r.writeHead(404);r.end('Not found');}else{r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':ct+';charset=utf-8'});r.end(d);}});}).listen(3456)
